summary.en: A framework for analyzing multi-sided ecosystems through participant sides, core interactions, network effects, governance, trust, monetization, and regulatory risk.
summary.zh: 一套分析多边生态系统的框架：看清参与方、核心交互、网络效应、治理、信任、变现和监管风险。

sources.label: Geoffrey G. Parker, Marshall W. Van Alstyne & Sangeet Paul Choudary · Platform Revolution · W. W. Norton & Company · 2016
Alexander Osterwalder & Yves Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 · Multi-sided platforms pattern

references.label: Platform Revolution · W. W. Norton & Company

note.en: Core source for network effects, platform governance, openness, launch, and monetization trade-offs.
note.zh: 网络效应、平台治理、开放性、启动和变现取舍的核心来源。

note.en: Business-model pattern source for understanding platform sides through BMC logic.
note.zh: 从 BMC 逻辑理解平台多边结构的商业模式模式来源。
